body:
## Rationale

Two anchor list pages targeting the highest-TAM queries in this niche that are NOT in any existing top10Lists.js entries or open proposals.

### Page 1: best-metal-drummers-of-all-time
- **Slug:** best-metal-drummers-of-all-time
- **Query served:** 'best metal drummers of all time' / 'greatest metal drummers ever' / 'top metal drummers history'
- **Why:** This is likely the single highest search-volume query in the metal drummer niche. Every competitor has a version. We don't. This is an anchor page that links to every major drummer on roster. Massive internal linking hub.
- **Content:** Ranked list (Lars, Dave Lombardo, Gene Hoglan, Danny Carey, Tomas Haake, Mike Portnoy, Brann Dailor, Vinnie Paul, Nicko McBrain, Bill Ward) with rationale per pick and links to each drummer's profile.

### Page 2: most-underrated-metal-drummers
- **Slug:** most-underrated-metal-drummers
- **Query served:** 'most underrated metal drummers' / 'underrated heavy metal drummers' / 'overlooked metal drumming legends'
- **Why:** High shareability and engagement. Different editorial angle from 'best of all time' — targets the discovery audience. Not on any competitor site in this format. Candidates: George Kollias, Flo Mounier, Morgan Ågren, Aquiles Priester, Martin Lopez, Kevin Talley, Travis Orbin, Blake Richardson.
- **Content:** 10 drummers with gear sections and links to their profiles. High internal linking value.

**Dedup confirmed:** Neither slug in top10Lists.js (10 entries: fastest, death-metal, innovative, thrash, budget, expensive, double-bass, brutal-solos, black-metal, progressive). Neither in any open seo-proposals (179 checked: 'all time' = NOT FOUND, 'most underrated' = NOT FOUND). Net-new.

## Data shape
Each page follows existing top10Lists.js schema:
- slug, title, emoji, description
- entries: [{rank, drummer (slug), name, band, note}]
- Each entry links to /drummer/[slug]

## Files to touch
- packages/frontend/data/top10Lists.js — add 2 entries
- public/llms/lists/best-metal-drummers-of-all-time.md
- public/llms/lists/most-underrated-metal-drummers.md

## Quality gate (per page)
- ≥300 words
- 10 ranked entries with rationale
- Internal links ≥10 (one per ranked drummer)
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A
- ItemList schema with ListItem entries

## Estimated organic uplift
Serves highest-TAM queries: 'best metal drummers of all time' (broadest possible query), 'most underrated' (discovery/shareability). Both drive internal links to 20+ drummer profiles. Anchor pages for LLM citation about 'who are the best metal drummers?'

## Verify
1. Both pages render at /lists/best-metal-drummers-of-all-time and /lists/most-underrated-metal-drummers
2. LLM files at /llms/lists/*.md
3. ItemList JSON-LD present
4. All drummer links resolve correctly
5. Pages appear in sitemap

## Done
[ ] 2 entries added to top10Lists.js
[ ] 2 LLM companion files created
[ ] Both pages render
title: SEO batch: Top-10 list pages batch 11 — best-metal-drummers-of-all-time + most-underrated-metal-drummers (~2 pages + 2 LLM files)
